name: watson
description: A wonderful CLI to track your time

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help for watson

options.name: --version
options.description: Show the version for watson

options.name: --color
options.description: Color output

options.name: --no-color
options.description: No color output

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add time to a project with tag(s) that was not tracked live

name: --from
-f
options.description: Date and time of start of tracked activity

name: --to
-t
options.description: Date and time of end of tracked activity

name: --confirm-new-project
-c
options.description: Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: aggregate
subcommands.description: Display a report of the time spent on each project aggregated by day

name: --current
-c
options.description: Include currently running frame in report

name: --no-current
-C
options.description: Don't include currently running frame in report

name: --from
-f
options.description: The date from when the reports should start. Defaults to seven days ago

name: --to
-t
options.description: The date at which the report should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow

name: --project
-p
options.description: Reports activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times

name: --tag
-T
options.description: Reports activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times

name: --json
-j
options.description: Format output in JSON instead of plain text

name: --csv
-s
options.description: Format output in CSV instead of plain text

name: --pager
-g
options.description: View output through a pager

name: --no-pager
-G
options.description: Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: cancel
subcommands.description: Cancel the last call to the start command. The time will not be recorded

name: --edit
-e
options.description: Edit the configuration file with an editor

name: --confirm-new-project
-c
options.description: Confirm addition of new project

name: --confirm-new-tag
-b
options.description: Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: frames
subcommands.description: Display the list of all frame IDs

subcommands.name: log
subcommands.description: Display each recorded session during the given timespan

name: --current
-c
options.description: Include currently running frame in report

name: --no-current
-C
options.description: Don't include currently running frame in report

name: --reverse
-r
options.description: Reverse the order of the days in output

name: --no-reverse
-R
options.description: Don't Reverse the order of the days in output

name: --from
-f
options.description: The date from when the log should start. Defaults to seven days ago

name: --to
-t
options.description: The date at which the log should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow

name: --year
-y
options.description: Reports activity for the current year

name: --month
-m
options.description: Reports activity for the current month

name: --luna
-l
options.description: Reports activity for the current moon cycle

name: --week
-w
options.description: Reports activity for the current week

name: --day
-d
options.description: Reports activity for the current day

name: --all
-a
options.description: Reports all activities

name: --project
-p
options.description: Logs activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times

name: --tag
-T
options.description: Logs activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times

options.name: --ignore-project
options.description: Logs activity for all projects but the given ones. You can ignore several projects by using the option multiple times. Any given project will be ignored

options.name: --ignore-tag
options.description: Logs activity for all tags but the given ones. You can ignore several tags by using the option multiple times. Any given tag will be ignored

name: --json
-j
options.description: Format output in JSON instead of plain text

name: --csv
-s
options.description: Format output in CSV instead of plain text

name: --pager
-g
options.description: View output through a pager

name: --no-pager
-G
options.description: Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: merge
subcommands.description: Perform a merge of the existing frames with a conflicting frames file.  When storing the frames on a file hosting service, there is the possibility that the frame file goes out-of-sync due to one or more of the connected clients going offline. This can cause the frames to diverge

name: -f
--force
options.description: If specified, then the merge will automatically be performed

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: Display the list of all the existing projects

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a frame. You can specify the frame either by id or by position (ex: -1 for the last frame)

name: -f
--force
options.description: Don’t ask for confirmation

subcommands.name: report
subcommands.description: Display a report of the time spent on each project

name: --current
-c
options.description: Include currently running frame in report

name: --no-current
-C
options.description: Don't include currently running frame in report

name: --from
-f
options.description: The date from when the report should start. Defaults to seven days ago

name: --to
-t
options.description: The date at which the report should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow

name: --year
-y
options.description: Reports activity for the current year

name: --month
-m
options.description: Reports activity for the current month

name: --luna
-l
options.description: Reports activity for the current moon cycle

name: --week
-w
options.description: Reports activity for the current week

name: --day
-d
options.description: Reports activity for the current day

name: --project
-p
options.description: Reports activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times

name: --tag
-T
options.description: Reports activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times

options.name: --ignore-project
options.description: Reports activity for all projects but the given ones. You can ignore several projects by using the option multiple times. Any given project will be ignored

options.name: --ignore-tag
options.description: Reports activity for all tags but the given ones. You can ignore several tags by using the option multiple times. Any given tag will be ignored

name: --json
-j
options.description: Format output in JSON instead of plain text

name: --csv
-s
options.description: Format output in CSV instead of plain text

name: --pager
-g
options.description: View output through a pager

name: --no-pager
-G
options.description: Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: restart
subcommands.description: Restart monitoring time for a previously stopped project

options.name: --at
options.description: Start frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format

name: --stop
-s
options.description: Stop an already running project

name: --no-stop
-S
options.description: Don't stop an already running project

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Start monitoring time for the given project. You can add tags indicating more specifically what you are working on with +tag

options.name: --at
options.description: Start frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format

name: --gap
-g
options.description: Leave gap between end time of previous project and start time of the current

name: --no-gap
-G
options.description: Don't leave gap between end time of previous project and start time of the current

name: --confirm-new-project
-c
options.description: Confirm addition of new project

name: --confirm-new-tag
-b
options.description: Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Display when the current project was started and the time spent since

name: --project
-p
options.description: Only output project

name: --tags
-t
options.description: Only show tags

name: --elapsed
-e
options.description: Only show time elapsed

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Stop monitoring time for the current project

options.name: --at
options.description: Stop frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format

subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Get the frames from the server and push the new ones

subcommands.name: tags
subcommands.description: Display the list of all the tags
